calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Bring Action To Trial
Off Calendar Jun-14-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. RESPONDENT DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES' Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Bring Action To Trial is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. The case is now dismissed. The moving party is to provide a form of order.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Bring Action To Trial
Off Calendar May-05-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John McGlothlin of Office of the Attorney General telephone number 510-622-2224 for Repsondent Department of Motor Vehicles.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

Mr. McGlothlin explained that service of the motion bounced back and requested that the matter be taken off calendar. The Court's tentative ruling is vacated. RESPONDENT DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES' Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Bring Action To Trial is off calendar at the request of the moving party.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/HK)
